name: Sheety KLEIDO
tagline: Every person sees through a different lens
subheading: KLEIDO reveals your natural work pattern across six dimensions. Not a type. Not a box. A full spectrum — uniquely yours.
dimensionsSubhead: Each dimension is a spectrum, not a label. Your KLEIDO profile shows where you naturally fall — and what that means for how you work best.

steps.title: Take the assessment
steps.desc: 15 minutes. Situational questions, not "rate yourself 1–5." Built around how you actually behave, not how you think you should.

steps.title: Get your KLEIDO profile
steps.desc: Six dimensions rendered as your unique spectrum — with plain-language insight into what each score means in practice.

steps.title: Apply it immediately
steps.desc: Practical recommendations for meeting structure, communication style, and focus rhythms — tailored to your specific profile.

steps.title: Go deeper when you need it
steps.desc: Unlock a Working With guide for one person's scores, or a full Group Dynamics report for your whole team. One-time, no subscription.

profileSubhead: Your KLEIDO profile is a shareable snapshot — specific enough to actually change how you structure your week, and clear enough for a manager to act on in ten seconds.
profileAnnotation: The sample here shows an experiential learner with high systematic Load and strong autonomy Drive — someone who needs space to learn by doing, but wants a clear process once they know the goal.
pricingSubhead: Your full KLEIDO profile is always free. Unlock deeper insight when you actually need it — no subscriptions, no commitment.
footerCtaSub: Free to take. 15 minutes. You'll actually use what you find.
footerByline: A practical work style assessment by Sheety Tools
